basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of Mumbai Port Authority. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognised University/Institution, Twelve years experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures in an industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognised University/Institution. Twelve years of experience in an executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance, preferably of Port and Marine structures in an industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking.

selection_process: Merit based on APARs (overall grading not below Very Good)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mumbai Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) posts is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognised University/Institution, along with twelve years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post in the Mumbai Port Authority recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 80000 to Rs. 220000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, determined by the candidate's Annual Performance Appraisal Reports (APARs), with an overall grading not below 'Very Good'.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) posts must be submitted online through the official website of the Mumbai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Mumbai Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Mumbai Port Authority is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is No. GAD/P/RECT-Dy.CE/2019.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for detailed information regarding age limits and any applicable age relaxation for reserved categories.
